sentence: 这个活动的报名人数有上限。
pinyin: Zhège huódòng de bàomíng rénshù yǒu shàng xiàn.
english: There is an upper limit on the number of people who can sign up for this event.

sentence: 那栋别墅雇了一位专业管家。
pinyin: Nà dòng biéshù gù le yī wèi zhuānyè guǎnjiā.
english: That villa hired a professional housekeeper.

sentence: 他把财产放入信托基金管理。
pinyin: Tā bǎ cáichǎn fàng rù xìntuō jījīn guǎnlǐ.
english: He placed his assets under the management of a trust fund.

sentence: 老师让我们找出12的所有因数。
pinyin: Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen zhǎo chū shí'èr de suǒyǒu yīnshù.
english: The teacher asked us to find all the factors of 12.

sentence: 他每天晚上都花两小时学编程。
pinyin: Tā měitiān wǎnshang dōu huā liǎng xiǎoshí xué biānchéng.
english: He spends two hours every evening learning programming.
